reason: Duplicate 'Brian Fox' person row (source=appointment) with account_id NULL and the same email as the canonical row eb4da000-dcf1-429b-a896-1d6df005ee75 (account_id=sam-hale-golf). The account_id backfill (supabase-storage.mts:595-598) collided with idx_people_account_email_unique on every request, returning PostgREST 409 and aborting all calendar saves with the misleading message 'Another person already uses that email address.'
restore_sql: INSERT INTO public.people (id, name, email, phone, notes, source, caddy_profile_id, caddy_profile_url, created_at, updated_at, account_id) VALUES ('65f7b016-20e0-461d-8e60-67ff9c5ce98d', 'Brian Fox', 'fox_brian@hotmail.com', '0274637700', NULL, 'appointment', NULL, NULL, '2026-07-12T09:09:48.908+00:00', '2026-07-12T09:09:48.908+00:00', NULL);
